text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son bien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR> .<FORMAT>avec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; die gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>- <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. – <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. – <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. – <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"Corrected multiple encoding artifacts (mojibake) to restore proper German and French characters (e.g., 'Buchläden', 'Bücher', 'Subscriptiones', 'appellé', 'die', '4to.'). Fixed OCR/typographical errors ('2vec fig.' to 'avec fig.', 'dien' to 'bien'). Standardized inconsistent price tags from <PRIZE> to <PRICE> and repaired a mismatched closing tag. Escaped unescaped ampersands ('&' to '&') to ensure XML well-formedness. Replaced three instances of corrupted symbol sequences with appropriate en-dashes for price separation."}

parsed.explanation: Corrected multiple encoding artifacts (mojibake) to restore proper German and French characters (e.g., 'Buchläden', 'Bücher', 'Subscriptiones', 'appellé', 'die', '4to.'). Fixed OCR/typographical errors ('2vec fig.' to 'avec fig.', 'dien' to 'bien'). Standardized inconsistent price tags from <PRIZE> to <PRICE> and repaired a mismatched closing tag. Escaped unescaped ampersands ('&' to '&') to ensure XML well-formedness. Replaced three instances of corrupted symbol sequences with appropriate en-dashes for price separation.
